name: Aciselsan Acipayam Seluloz Sanayi Ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Aciselsan Acipayam Seluloz Sanayi Ve Ticaret A.S. manufactures and sells carboxymethylcellulose (CMC) in Turkey. The company also engages in import, export, and trading of various chemicals. Its CMC is used in powders and cream detergents, paints, wallpaper adhesives, textiles, foods, oil drilling, ceramics, pharmaceuticals, and cosmetics, as well as in welding rods. The company was founded in 1973 and is based in Denizli, Turkey.
